about.title: About Me
about.description: Backend and data-focused engineer with 3+ years of experience at Infosys building backend services, AI workflows, and data-driven systems. Experienced in Python and Node.js development, Generative AI integrations using OpenAI APIs, large-scale AI data annotation pipelines, and analytics reporting. Strong foundation in full stack engineering, blockchain-based applications, and AI data operations.

projects.title: Crypto Wallet
projects.description: Decentralized crypto wallet enabling users to send and receive cryptocurrency using wallet addresses. Implemented Ethereum smart contracts using Solidity for secure on-chain transaction execution.
